title: Kortrijk, West Flanders — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kortrijk, West Flanders: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kortrijk is a city in West Flanders with a population of 77,000. A historic city in West Flanders with a well-preserved medieval center, thriving textile industry, and excellent shopping districts.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
